about.title: What this app does
about.description: OpenAccess Paper Finder helps researchers quickly discover scholarly works from OpenAlex. Search by DOI or paper title to retrieve metadata, inspect abstracts, and check whether a paper is open access.
about.card1Text: Use DOI or title-based search with a polished academic interface.
about.card2Text: Verify whether a paper is open access and where to find it.
about.card3Text: Explore authors, journals, citation counts, and abstracts at a glance.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or may have moved.
